meaning: n.环,线(绳)圈,弯曲部分,回路,回线,(铁路)让车道,(飞机)翻圈飞行vt.使成环,以圈结,以环连结vi.打环,翻筋斗n.循环
examples: These things are usually stamped with the recycling loop.
This closed loop is part of a water-supply system in which "every drop counts".
He'd attack the bedroom, living room and dining-room windows before returning to the greenhouse to repeat his loop.
Ford pushed suppliers to develop closed-loop manufacturing processes, which had the added benefit of lowering costs.
